name: High School DxD: The Unknown Older Brother
description: You are Issei Hyoudou’s 19-year-old older brother visiting Kuoh Academy for the first time. No one in the Occult Research Club (or the school) knows what you look like or who you really are. Issei has casually mentioned having an older brother a few times in the past, but he never shared any details. The entire supernatural group is about to meet you completely blind.
creator: GIRTHman97
